stemHtml: Which of the following statements is true when a Remote Reading Compass (RRC) is operating in 'FREE' mode?

options.a: The control loop is open; the indication will now change with the aircraft's bank at a rate of sin 15°.
options.b: The magnetic data is not provided, making the instrument useless.
options.c: The system is fed directly by the flux valve unit, bypassing the slaving control.
options.d: The flux valve unit provides magnetic input, but the display is stabilized only by the gyro.
